feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why do people keep saying that Paul Verhoeven wanted to make a bad Starship Troo…

Is there a lot of mentally ill leftist propaganda?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Club Nintendo DSi Event
entry.content: Okay /v/, I need your help. At some point in early 2009 I was invited to a special club Nintendo platinum member event to preview the DSi at Universal City Walk in Los Angeles. While there we got to test out the DSi, get photos printed of our faces with Mario overlays saying “this is what I look like on DSi” and were given Wii Fit tote bags and Wii branded water bottles. The thing is, I cannot find any record or details about this event ever existing. There was a midnight launch party there a fe

entry.title: /b/ Random: Help me enrich vocabulary ASAP
entry.content: So, I am not a native english speaker, so I need some help with slang. I need you to send every fucking abbreviation, slang words for sex and masturbation, for going outside and chilling on the snack. And these are things I could ask on reddid, but I also need math words. And again from the very beginning with variations of multiplication to complex integral-related words cuz I just need a translation. And I know about modern dictionary and google translate, but I need a more concise and precise

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: It is impossible to visualize the scale of the universe in the part of the unive…
entry.content: It is impossible to visualize the scale of the universe in the part of the universe we can see. There are something like roughly two trillion galaxies; we haven’t counted them all, but that is an estimate based on surveys of the local universe. Two trillion, two thousand billion galaxies, and each galaxy is, let’s say, around the size of the Milky Way. Some are bigger, some are smaller, but the Milky Way has 400 billion stars in it. It takes light over 100,000 years to cross a galaxy, and there

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Friends, i think i think i got raped by my sister. I fell asleep and all i could…
entry.content: Friends, i think i think i got raped by my sister. I fell asleep and all i could see and remember was silent and a pale hand giving me food, i looked back to my bad and i saw pale feminine leggs trying to hide intimal parts. Later, i heard on my phone a rough sex sound, like it was the first time, i kept sleeping for 2 days i barely could walk. What did she give me? Nobody believes me when i tell this :(

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Unironically just set up Mavericks on my MBP 2013, is it worth? Yes and no. It s…
entry.content: Unironically just set up Mavericks on my MBP 2013, is it worth? Yes and no. It seems mac os popularity started with Mac os yosemite for some reason. It's almost like windows 7 never been popular. Most of the software is not available including drivers, it literally give you basic functionality because without drivers you can't use tablet to draw stuff. 'fanfic' browsers can't download your cloud stuff without dying so you must enter passwords manually, and they often crash. This shit is so fucki

entry.title: /g/ Technology: does anyone else remember when the internet was like a huge non stop party? you …
entry.content: does anyone else remember when the internet was like a huge non stop party? you went on runescape and everyone was talking with drop parties and people everywhere. you went on xbox and everyone was talking and forming parties. you went on 4chan and the catalog looked different every couple hours even late at night. There was hobbyist foums for everything chatrooms were fun and active. every mmo was full of people talking and hanging out. guilds were a social fun thing. it was better too because

Is there any way I could profit off of this? Does any other anons on here have any plans with their massive 4chan folder collections? What do we do? Just let the folders sit there and die eventually? Do we fap to our R34 and massive amounts of porn/hentai? What do we do? I must figure out a plan. I want to start focusing on

entry.title: /o/ Auto: people buying Ferrari roadcars are missing the point
entry.content: The real soul of Ferrari is the Scuderia, SEFAC Ferrari. Enzo never gave a shit about his road cars. The old man either drove old Peugeots or a Mini Cooper or was driven around. He only built the road cars so right morons could fund the Scuderia, he literally ran his operations from a table on the middle of the Scuderia floor. The road cars were just a nuisance capital building enterprise that he barely paid attention to, and when he did it was because his acocuntants made him take photos next t
